commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh O keep my soul, and deliver me: let me not be ashamed; for I put my trust in you. Augustine of Hippo 20. "Keep my soul, and deliver me. " Keep my soul, that I turn not aside to imitate them; and draw me out from the confusion wherein they are mingled with me. "Let me not be confounded, for I have put my trust in Thee" (ver. Let me not be confounded, if haply they rise up against me: for not in myself, but in Thee have I put my trust.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Soul. David was most concerned for it; (Berthier) and those who sincerely place their confidence in God, will never be confounded. (Worthington)
